message:
feat: display build metadata in --version output

Enhances version output to include git commit and build timestamp:

```
vc 0.1.0 (abc123f; built 2026-01-28T00:00:00Z)
```

Implementation:
- Uses vergen environment variables set by build.rs
- VERGEN_GIT_SHA: Short git commit hash
- VERGEN_BUILD_TIMESTAMP: ISO 8601 build time
- Overrides clap's default version with custom format

This helps users identify exact builds when reporting issues
and verifies deployment of expected versions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
